text:
John Doe - Senior Full Stack Developer

Summary:
Experienced full-stack developer with 8+ years of professional experience building scalable web applications using modern technologies. Expertise in cloud infrastructure, microservices architecture, and agile development methodologies.

Professional Experience:

Tech Lead at Google (2021-Present)
- Led team of 5 engineers in developing microservices using Python, Django, and FastAPI
- Designed and implemented Kubernetes-based deployment pipeline
- Optimized database queries using PostgreSQL and Redis caching
- Mentored junior developers on best practices in code review and testing

Software Engineer at Microsoft (2018-2021)
- Built real-time web applications using React, Node.js, and WebSockets
- Developed REST APIs and GraphQL endpoints for mobile applications
- Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Docker
- Improved system performance by 40% through optimization

Junior Developer at Startup (2015-2018)
- Full-stack development with JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3
- Built features using Angular and jQuery
- Managed databases: MySQL, MongoDB, Firebase
- Deployed applications to AWS and Azure cloud platforms

Technical Skills:
- Languages: Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, Go, Rust
- Frontend: React, Vue.js, Angular, Next.js, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Django, Flask, FastAPI, Node.js, Express, Spring Boot
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform
- Tools: Git, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Jira, Postman
- Testing: Jest, Pytest, Mocha, Selenium, Cypress
- Other: Machine Learning basics (TensorFlow, Scikit-Learn), Data Science

Soft Skills:
- Leadership and team management
- Problem-solving and critical thinking
- Communication and presentation
- Agile/Scrum methodology
- Project management

Education:
B.S. in Computer Science - Stanford University (2015)
GPA: 3.8/4.0

Certifications:
- AWS Certified Solutions Architect
- Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
- Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer

Projects:
- E-commerce Platform: Built with React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Stripe integration
- Analytics Dashboard: Real-time data visualization using Jupyter, Plotly, Pandas
- DevOps Infrastructure: Automated deployment using Terraform and Ansible

Sarah Johnson - Data Scientist & ML Engineer

Professional Summary:
Data scientist with 6+ years of experience in machine learning, deep learning, and big data analytics. Proven track record of developing production ML models that drive business impact.

Work Experience:

Senior ML Engineer at Facebook (2020-Present)
- Developed recommendation system using PyTorch and TensorFlow
- Processed large datasets using Spark and Hadoop
- Implemented A/B testing framework for model evaluation
- Published research on deep learning optimization

Data Scientist at Amazon (2017-2020)
- Built predictive models using Scikit-Learn and XGBoost
- Processed data with Pandas, NumPy, SQL
- Created data visualizations using Matplotlib and Seaborn
- Automated data pipelines with Apache Airflow

Junior Data Analyst at Startup (2016-2017)
- Analyzed user behavior with SQL and Python
- Created dashboards using Tableau and PowerBI
- Performed statistical analysis and A/B testing

Core Competencies:
- Programming: Python, R, Julia, SQL
- Machine Learning: TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, Scikit-Learn
- Data Processing: Pandas, NumPy, PySpark, Hadoop
- Deep Learning: CNNs, RNNs, BERT, GPT, Transformers
- NLP: NLTK, Spacy, Hugging Face, Gensim
- Visualization: Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly, Tableau
- Big Data: Spark, Kafka, Hive, Pig
- Cloud: AWS (SageMaker, S3, EC2), Google Cloud (BigQuery, Vertex AI)
- MLOps: Docker, Kubernetes, Airflow, Jenkins, Git
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Cassandra, DynamoDB

Education:
M.S. in Statistics - MIT (2016)
B.S. in Mathematics - UC Berkeley (2014)

Publications:
- "Efficient Deep Learning for Time Series Forecasting" - Published in NeurIPS 2022
- "Improving ML Model Fairness" - Medium Blog Series

Certifications:
- Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer
- AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty

Michael Chen - Mobile Developer

About:
Mobile development specialist with 5+ years of experience building high-performance iOS and Android applications. Proficient in native development, cross-platform frameworks, and modern app architecture.

Experience:

Senior iOS Developer at Apple (2022-Present)
- Developed iOS apps using Swift and SwiftUI
- Implemented ARKit for augmented reality features
- Optimized app performance and memory usage
- Mentored team on iOS best practices

Android Developer at Google (2019-2022)
- Built Android apps with Kotlin and Java
- Implemented Material Design principles
- Used Room database and Firebase integration
- Collaborated with UX/UI teams

Cross-Platform Developer at Adobe (2017-2019)
- Developed apps using React Native and Flutter
- Built iOS apps with Objective-C
- Integrated REST APIs and WebSocket connections
- Managed app deployments to App Store and Play Store

Key Skills:
- Mobile Platforms: iOS, Android, macOS, React Native, Flutter
- Languages: Swift, Kotlin, Java, Dart, Objective-C, JavaScript
- Frameworks: SwiftUI, Jetpack, React Native, Flutter
- Backend Integration: REST APIs, GraphQL, Firebase, AWS Amplify
- Tools: Xcode, Android Studio, Git, Jira, TestFlight, Firebase Analytics
- Testing: XCTest, JUnit, Espresso, Detox
- Cloud Services: AWS, Google Cloud, Firebase, Azure
- Databases: SQLite, Realm, Firebase Realtime Database, Firestore
- Architecture: MVVM, MVC, Clean Architecture, SOLID principles

Education:
B.S. in Computer Engineering - UC San Diego (2017)

Certifications:
- Google Certified Associate Android Developer
- Apple Swift Certified Developer
